texts.t002: The complete SIE drive ecosystem — swing, sliding, shutter, sectional and high-speed door motors, control boards, rolling-code remotes, photocells, loops and genuine spares with pan-India support.

texts.t015: Boards, arms, racks, springs, curtains and gaskets ex-stock Mumbai.
texts.t016: Do you supply to dealers and fabricators?
texts.t017: Yes — we support a pan-India dealer network across 11+ cities with trade pricing, training and spares.
texts.t025: GI, aluminium, polycarbonate & India's only 100% Indian-make full-length transparent shutter.
